✅ 1. Setup Guide (Instructions Page)

📌 https://loader.red/instructions.html

  1. Open the instructions link
  2. Download the loader file
  3. Extract or install it
  4. Run the program (Loader.exe)
  5. Paste your key when prompted
  6. Adjust settings if needed
  7. Launch Rust and use the tool

📥 2. Download the Tool

📌 https://loader.red/

  1. Go to the main site
  2. Click Download
  3. Save the file
  4. Extract/install
  5. Open the loader to begin

💬 3. Support + Key Help

📌 https://discord.gg/metacheats

  • Go to the key/activation channel
  • Ask in support if you have issues or need a key

products.name: R6 – Account Gen
products.description:
Rainbow Six Siege Account Generator

We now offer a Rainbow Six Siege account generator with instant access to Ubisoft accounts. Accounts come with varying levels of progression, items, and in-game content depending on availability.

These accounts are suitable for players looking to get into R6 without starting from scratch. Most accounts include levels, operators, or cosmetics, making them a solid option for casual play and general use.

Availability may vary by platform and region. Please read all notes on each listing before purchasing to understand current limitations or restrictions.

If you have questions before buying, support is available to help clarify details.
products.instructions:
How to Receive Your Rainbow Six Siege Account Gen

To access and receive Rainbow Six Siege – Account Gen, you must join our official Discord server after purchasing.

✅ Steps to Get Your Gen:

  1. Purchase AccountGen
  2. Join our Discord server here:
    https://discord.gg/metacheats
  3. Once inside, go to the support section and create a ticket
  4. Provide your purchase proof in the ticket
  5. Our team will deliver your Account Gen access and help you get set up

products.name: Lvl 90 | Ectoplasm | PSN
products.description:
Clean Level 90 Rainbow Six Siege account with solid progression and a rare Ectoplasm skin included. Perfect for someone who wants a ready-to-play account without starting from scratch.

Account Details:

  • 🎮 PSN Linkable
  • ⭐ Level 90
  • 💳 120 R6 Credits
  • 💰 9,564 Renown
  • 🎒 28 Items
  • 👻 Rare Ectoplasm Skin

Great mid-level account with credits and renown available to spend. Ready to link and jump straight into matches.
products.instructions:
📌 IMPORTANT – ACCOUNT SUPPORT INSTRUCTIONS

If the account does not work after purchase, you must:
1️⃣ Open a support ticket in the Discord server
2️⃣ Include proof of purchase
3️⃣ Send them my Discord link so they can contact me directly

🔗 My Discord: [https://discord.gg/metacheats

⚠️ Support is handled only through Discord tickets to keep everything secure and documented.


📌 IMPORTANT – HOW TO USE YOUR PURCHASED ACCOUNT

To use the account on the platform it is linkable to (PSN/XBL/etc.), you must:

1️⃣ Open Rainbow Six Siege on your console/platform
2️⃣ When prompted, log in using the Ubisoft account details you purchased
3️⃣ The game will automatically link and load the account on that platform
4️⃣ Once logged in, you will have full access to all items, ranks, and skins

⚠️ Make sure you are signing into the Ubisoft account you bought, not your old one.

If you have any issues after purchase, please open a support ticket in the Discord server and include proof of purchase.

products.name: Pre‑ranked and fully stacked R6 Siege accounts.
products.description:
Get your Rainbow Six Siege accounts pre‑ranked and fully stacked.

Ready to jump into ranked play—no waiting or leveling required.

Clean, secure accounts with verified data.

Perfect for competitive players who want instant action.
products.instructions:
If you haven’t received your account information by email:

  1. Please check your spam or junk folder first.
  2. Double-check that you entered the correct email address at checkout.
  3. If you still don’t see it, join our official support Discord and create a support ticket.

Once you’re in the server, head to the #support or #create-ticket channel and open a ticket. Our team will verify your purchase and resend your details as quickly as possible.


https://discord.gg/metacheats





If you’re on PC and ready to jump into ranked, don’t queue up until you read this.


FIRST LOG OUT OF UBISOFT APP (must)

step one go into indigo mode on google or browser of choice go to xbox.com,

create a fresh xbox account with a email you have accses (acces needed to make FA in 60 days),

go to ubisoft help cases click on help cases,

should say "you need a account to see cases or something and click on login,

click the xbox icon and sign in to microsoft with the xbox account you just made,

it will then ask you to sign in to ubisoft, sign into the account you just brought,

once it refreshes page and shows you as logged into the ubisoft account then you have linked the xbox! (almost done),

download and open the xbox app for PC sign into the xbox account you just linked to the ranked ready,

products.name: Verified Rainbow Six Siege (PS4) Diamond Rank NFA Accounts
products.description: These are confirmed, high-level Rainbow Six Siege accounts featuring verified Diamond rank status on PS4. Important Note: These accounts are Non-Fungible Assets (NFA), meaning they are unique, often tied to specific player history and typically non-transferable.
products.instructions:
📩 Important: Join Discord & Create a Ticket

After completing your purchase, you must join our Discord server to receive your information.

Once inside the server:

  1. Go to the support/tickets channel
  2. Click “Create Ticket”
  3. Provide your order ID and purchase email
  4. Wait for a staff member to assist you

⚠️ Orders will only be delivered through tickets.
If you do not create a ticket, we will not be able to process your order.

Click here to join: [https://discord.gg/metacheats]
